name: lookup_device
description: Look up an employee's company-issued device(s). Returns model, OS version, last check-in, encryption status, and any pending updates.

name: check_vpn_status
description: Check whether an employee's VPN account is active, what region they're connected from, and recent connection history.

name: check_account_status
description: Check whether an employee's primary account is active, locked, or pending password reset. Returns lockout reason and last successful login.

name: reset_password
description: Trigger a password reset email for an employee. Returns confirmation and the email the link was sent to.
